notes: The Community + license release. Signal Loom is now free for personal and noncommercial use; the one-time $17.99 commercial license (Settings → License, verified offline, one key for desktop and Android) unlocks the professional print-production exports. Motion comics: speech/thought bubbles and captions as keyframeable timeline clips with full typesetting. Pro editing: JKL shuttle, source in/out three-point insert/overwrite, ripple and roll trims, markers, audio fades, track locks, collapsible tracks, tabbed Program sidebar, and FCP7 XML export for Premiere. Paper: AI Fix Frame repaints a panel from correct sibling references (with region marquee), and whole pages export to the Source Library for panel-to-panel motion-comic animation. Fixed: Source Library deletes stick and sync is far lighter, splash artwork, panel snapping.
